titleStmt.title: SII 17.186: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 186. (A.R. No. 166 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
Rājēndrachōḷa I. Year 8 and 10: 1020 and 1022 A.D.
This record commences with the well-known praśasti, Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc., of Rājēndra Chōḷa I.

This records the gift of a plate of bell-metal to god Mūlasthānam-uḍaiya Mahādēvar in Tiruvakkarai in Tirubhuvanamahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, and gifts of sheep for two perpetual lamps, one to the god Tiruvuttīśvaram-uḍaiya Mahādēva in Vaḻudavūr, a hamlet of Tiruvakkarai and the other to god Tiruva[ga]stīśvaram-uḍaiya Mahādēva in Oḻugaṟai, another hamlet of Tiruvakkarai, by Kumāri Kuṭṭi alias Abhimāṉamēru-chchōḻamuttaraiyaṉ, a resident of Āṟṟuppākkam, a northern hamlet of Tiruvakkarai.
The same donor made another endowment of sheep for a perpetual lamp in the 10th year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭan=taiyum poṟceyaṟpāvaiyum cir
ttaniccelviyun taṉperun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyiluḻiyuḷiṭai tuṟai nāṭun=tu
ṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷk koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇa
ṟ karumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicartamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil mu
ṭiyum muṉṉavaṉ pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tiraṉāramun teṇṭiṟai Īḻamaṇ
ṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyilc cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyu
m ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟcciṉavil Irupattoru kāl
laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ maivarum cān=tinaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku mu
ṭiyu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāna śrīrājentira coḻadevaṟk=ku
yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu vaṭakarai jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu brahmadeyam śrīti
ribhuvanamahādevi caturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvakkarai śrīmulasthānamuṭaiya mahādevaṟk=ku
vaṭapiṭākai Āṟṟuppākkattirukkum kumāri kuṭṭiyāṉa Abhimāṉameruc coḻamuttaraiyan
Iṭṭa veṇkalattaḷikai Oṉṟiṉāl niṟai Aṟupattu nāṟpalam vaṭapiṭākai va
ḻutavūr tiruvuttiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟk=ku vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu mivu
rirukku maṉṟāṭi kāṭṭuraṉ Araciliyum kāṭṭuraṉ kuppaiyum pāṭṭañceyakkaṭavār Ivarkaḷ vaca
ttāṭu toṇṇuṟ ṟaiñcu kiḻpiṭākai Oḻukaṟai tiruvakastiśvaramuṭaiya
mahādevaṟkku vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟinukku Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟaiñcu Ivai
kaikkoṇṭu pāṭṭañ ceyakkaṭavāṉ vaḻutavū rirukku maṉṟāṭi pūmi nakkaṉ Ivai cāvā muvā
p perāṭu cantrādit=tavaṟ niṟka meṟpaṭiyāṉ yāṇṭu 10 Āvatu tiruvakkarai śrīmūlasthā nammu
ṭaiya mahādevaṟku vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakkoṉṟiṉuk=ku Āṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kai⌈
k=koṇṭu pāṭṭañceyya k=kaṭava maṉṟāṭi tribhuvaṉamahādeviccaturvvetimaṅkalattu maṉṟā
Digital edition of SII 17.186 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
